_comment: Generic rules for detecting request/error tables in API documentation. All keyword lists use OR logic between groups, AND logic within each group.
_error_code_pattern_comment: Regex to validate error codes. Currently matches dot-delimited codes like DT.005.00.000 or ERR.001
_error_table_col0_comment: When true, error code starts at col[1] (col[0] is STT/sequence number). Set false if code is in col[0].
_request_table_column_aliases_comment: Maps logical column roles to possible header text (case-insensitive). Used for auto-detection of column positions from header row. Note: 'description' removed from 'note' to avoid mis-mapping; 'default_value' added to capture cross-references like 'See ... at 1.2'.
_error_table_column_aliases_comment: Maps logical error column roles to possible header text (case-insensitive).
_prose_filter_keywords_comment: Keywords that indicate a Note cell is prose/description rather than an enum value. Used in extract_enum_values_from_note().
